unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Christina has her own apartment, with her own car.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：a + part（部分）+ ment（名词后缀） -> 楼房里划分出的一小部分，即“公寓”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Please send me the details of the plan.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：de（向下/详细）+ tail（剪/切） -> 详细剪切，即“详情/细节”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Is any of this junk usable?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：use（使用）+ able（能……的） -> 能使用的，可用的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Cook over a medium heat for 15 minutes.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：medi（中间）+ um -> 中等的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Did you ever dream about me?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：dream（梦/梦想）+ about（关于） -> 梦到；梦想。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The performance finally started half an hour late.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：final（最后的）+ ly（副词后缀） -> 终于，最后。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 不完美的；有缺点的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's an imperfect solution to a difficult problem.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：im（否定前缀）+ perfect（完美的） -> 不完美的。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: have something to do with vs have nothing to do with
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Her job has something to do with computers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：have something to do with... 意为“与……有关系”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've done some research to find out the cheapest way of traveling there.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：re（反复）+ search（寻找/搜寻） -> 反复搜寻，即“研究、调查”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Going away to college has made me much more independent.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：in（否定前缀）+ dependent（依赖的） -> 独立的，自主的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There was a sudden fall in temperature.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：temper（脾气/温度）+ ature -> 气温，温度。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Her voice lowered as she spoke.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：low（低的）+ er（动词化/比较级形式） -> 降低，减少。
联想记忆：tr + end（结束/目标） -> 发展的终点，即“趋势”。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 逐渐形成；逐渐养成
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She developed an interest in music when she was just a child.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：de + velop（包裹） -> 脱去包裹，使之展现、发展，即“逐渐养成/发展”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have quite a good relationship with my parents.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：relation（关系）+ ship（名词后缀，表状态） -> 关系，联系。
联想记忆：improve（改进）+ ment（名词后缀） -> 改进，改善。
